text: Google unveils screenless Fitbit Air, new Google Health app The Fitbit app has been rebranded as the Google Health app, where users can view their data, upload medical records and receive AI-enabled health coaching.

Omada Health reports 42% revenue growth in Q1 2026 earnings Amazon Pharmacy debuts Ozempic pill delivery and in-office pickup $13M raised for autism diagnostics AI and more briefs Quantum Health adds prescription cost guidance through Scripta integration The partnership aims to help employers and members identify lower-cost medication alternatives and manage rising pharmacy spending.

Predictive analytics, AI remain challenges for health systems HIMSS research reveals that health systems are struggling the most with developing the predictive analytics that AI-driven personalized care delivery requires, says Alexandra Wright, director of research of HIMSS' Office of Scientific Research.

Privacy and security rules extend to paper records During downtime events, health systems may temporarily switch to paper records. Polsinelli Law Firm's Rebecca Romine cautions that these records are also subject to HIPAA regulations and must be properly handled and disposed of.
Latest Middle East partnerships expanding Korean health tech and more briefs Also, a portable saliva-based cancer risk detection device powered by AI is set for larger-scale trials in Hong Kong.

No-code tools can help clinicians build custom AI agents The company's agentic AI cloud offers clinicians the ability to create new agents using natural language that can perform simple functions like patient outreach, Innovaccer CEO Abhinav Shashank says.
Dandelion Health raises $14M for precision medicine platform The company will use the funds to scale its reach, expand partnerships and enhance its data infrastructure.

Jeremy Renner recounts near-fatal accident, calls for better healthcare data sharing ​ Q&A: AWS on new AI agents, quantum computing in healthcare Jon McNeill on mastering scaling and innovation Samsung releases Galaxy Watch blood pressure feature in U. S.

Google unveils medical records integration in Fitbit app at Check Up event MobiHealthNews: The latest news in digital health delivered daily to your inbox. Fewer EHR choices mean higher prices for health systems AMAM helps hospitals advance their Quintuple Aim goals.
